periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 1am and 3am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3am and 4am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 4am and 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 58. South southwest wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

periods.name: Wednesday
